name: control_light
description: Control one or more smart lights. Can set power (on/off), brightness (0-100), and color (hex #rrggbb). Specify device_ids as a list. Use ["all"] to target all devices. All fields except device_ids are optional — only include what needs to change.

device_ids.description: List of device IDs to control. Use ["all"] for all devices.

name: query_lights
description: Query the current status of smart lights. Returns power state, brightness, color, and online status. Specify device_ids as a list. Use ["all"] to query all devices.

device_ids.description: List of device IDs to query. Use ["all"] for all devices.
